title: ClassiWool
description: ClassiWool is a Minecraft mod that revives the nostalgic, classic wool colors from the early indev days of Minecraft and more!
body:
![ClassiWool Text Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c39ac96881cb9b52e12bdc82a35041f4c70431f_0.webp)

## The Goal
**ClassiWool** is a Minecraft Mod that adds the long lost forgotten old Classic colors from the classic version of the game. It adds not only wools, but dyes and other stuff that can be dyed.

## What does it add?
**ClassiWool** adds a lot of new variants of wools, glass, glass panes, concrete, concrete powder, terracotta, carpets, and more! There's more to come as well! *this takes time*

## What can you do with the mod?
You can add exstensions to the mod and make it the way you want it to be! I'm not stopping your creativity!

**Credit for Most of the Description of this Mod: Zel**
